overview: yodhaMedia is a complete, production-ready marketing and media website built with Next.js 15 App Router, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS v4. It features a 3D hero section, Framer Motion animations, glassmorphism design, dark mode, blog management system, and a full admin interface — all in a standalone project ready to run.
features: 3D hero scene with Three.js and React Three Fiber
Framer Motion scroll animations and magnetic CTAs
Glassmorphism design with deep purple and gold brand palette
Dark mode toggle persisted in localStorage
Full blog system with admin dashboard, create, and edit pages
Consultation modal and WhatsApp float button
Working API routes for blog CRUD operations
8 public pages: Home, About, Services, Blog, Our Work, Business Hub
